title: Linköping, Östergötland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Linköping, Östergötland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Linköping is a city in Östergötland with a population of 162,000. A growing tech and aviation hub, home to Linköping University and Saab’s aerospace headquarters.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
